MS-DOS.tip: DOS → x86 (i386 PC) + Legacy ISA. 64-bit guests cannot run DOS.

PC DOS.tip: PC DOS → x86 (i386 PC) + Legacy ISA.

Windows 1.x.tip: Windows 1.x needs x86 (i386 PC) / ISA PC. Cannot run as an x86_64 guest.

Windows 2.x.tip: Windows 2.x needs x86 (i386 PC) / ISA PC. Cannot run as an x86_64 guest.

Windows 3.x.tip: Windows 3.x needs x86 (i386 PC) / ISA PC. Cannot run as an x86_64 guest.

Windows 95.tip: Windows 95 → x86 (i386 PC) + pc (i440FX). Force TCG on Windows hosts; CPU pentium2; cirrus; ACPI off.

Windows 98.tip: Windows 98 (proven AQEMU profile): i386 + pc, Force TCG / pentium2, cirrus, ACPI off, IDE disk, ne2k_pci, sb16, 128 MB, 1 CPU.

Windows ME.tip: Windows ME → x86 (i386 PC) + pc (i440FX). Not forced to pure TCG (unlike 95/98).

Windows NT 3.x.tip: Windows NT 3.x → x86 (i386 PC). Avoid x86_64.

Windows NT 4.0.tip: Windows NT 4.0 → x86 (i386 PC). Avoid x86_64.

Windows 2000.tip: Windows 2000 → x86 (i386 PC) + pc. Win2K disk hack can help.

Windows 11.tip: Windows 11 → x86_64 (PC) + Q35. On ARM hosts AQEMU switches to AArch64 + virt.

Rocky Linux.tip: Rocky Linux → x86_64 (PC) + Q35 with VirtIO.

SUSE Linux.tip: SUSE Linux → x86_64 (PC) + Q35 with VirtIO.

Kali Linux.tip: Kali Linux → x86_64 (PC) + Q35 with VirtIO.

DragonFly BSD.tip: DragonFly BSD → x86_64 (PC) + Q35 with VirtIO.

Mac OS 7.tip: Classic Mac OS 7 → qemu-system-ppc + mac99. Supply your own boot CD/ISO or HDD image.

Mac OS 8.tip: Classic Mac OS 8 → qemu-system-ppc + mac99. Supply your own boot CD/ISO or HDD image.

Mac OS 9.tip: Classic Mac OS 9 → qemu-system-ppc + mac99. Supply your own boot CD/ISO or HDD image.

Mac OS X PPC.tip: Mac OS X PPC → qemu-system-ppc + mac99. Ensure qemu-system-ppc is installed.

Mac OS X Intel.tip: Intel Mac OS X (experimental): qemu-system-x86_64 + q35 (PC-class hardware for OpenCore). Supply OpenCore, OVMF, OSK, install media.

macOS.tip: Intel macOS (experimental): qemu-system-x86_64 + q35 (PC-class hardware for OpenCore — not Apple Silicon). On an x86_64 host AQEMU selects KVM/WHPX by default. Supply OpenCore, OVMF, OSK, install media. AQEMU does not ship Apple files.

Darwin.tip: Darwin / Intel macOS path: qemu-system-x86_64 + q35. Supply OpenCore, OVMF, OSK, install media.

Solaris x86.tip: Solaris 11.4 x86 (r/qemu_kvm recipe): pc+usb=off, std VGA, e1000, sb16, IDE, 8 GB, WHPX/KVM, PIIX4 disable_s3/s4. Use sol-11_4-text-x86.iso. Install can sit on the SunOS banner / at 99% for 1–2 hours while the disk image keeps growing — not frozen. After install: create a normal user (root console login blocked); later pkg update + solaris-desktop; then VirtIO is optional.

Solaris x86 (32-bit).tip: Legacy Solaris 8/9/early 10 x86 (32-bit only) → IBM PC 32Bit. Modern ISOs will say “No long mode support” here — use Solaris x86 instead.

OpenSolaris.tip: OpenSolaris → same family as Solaris x86: std VGA, IDE, e1000, AC97, WHPX/KVM preferred.

IRIX 5.x.tip: IRIX 5.x → MIPS Magnum. Experimental; needs a suitable IRIX image.

IRIX 6.x.tip: IRIX 6.x → MIPS Magnum. Experimental; needs a suitable IRIX image.

AIX.tip: AIX → qemu-system-ppc64 -M pseries -cpu POWER8. WHPX cannot accelerate POWER (TCG only, very slow). Use virtio-scsi, ≥2 GB RAM. For a VGA window do not set prom-env input/output to /vdevice/vty (that is for -nographic serial). True host↔guest clipboard needs spice-vdagent in the guest — AIX/SLOF do not provide that; paste into the QEMU window is host-display only. Prebuilt VMware VMDKs often fail with SLOF E3403 Bad executable.

OS/2.tip: OS/2 Warp (proven AQEMU profile): i386 + pc, Force TCG / pentium3, cirrus, ACPI off, IDE (not VirtIO), rtl8139, ES1370, 512 MB, 1 CPU. LVM Error 9 usually means VirtIO/ACPI.

eComStation.tip: eComStation → i386 PC with IDE disk (not VirtIO), ACPI off.

ArcaOS.tip: ArcaOS → i386 PC with IDE disk (not VirtIO), ACPI off.

OpenVMS.tip: OpenVMS → Alpha Server / clipper (best QEMU fit). VAX is not available in mainline QEMU.

BeOS.tip: BeOS → x86 (i386 PC). Use a BeOS-compatible disk/ISO.

AmigaOS.tip: AmigaOS → PowerPC / amigaone. Requires qemu-system-ppc with amigaone machine support.

MorphOS.tip: MorphOS → PowerPC / sam460ex. Requires qemu-system-ppc with sam460ex.

RISC OS.tip: RISC OS → ARM virt. Needs a specialized RISC OS image; machine choice may need tuning.

ChromeOS.tip: ChromeOS (Brunch/Chromium OS style) → x86_64 + Q35. For Google’s Flex recovery .bin use “Chrome OS Flex” instead.

Chrome OS Flex.tip: Chrome OS Flex: extract recovery .bin, attach as raw disk (not ISO), install to VirtIO/qcow2. Prefer VirtIO VGA; on Linux/KVM try VirtIO VGA (GL). Not official in VMs.

SteamOS.tip: SteamOS recovery (.bz2→.img): UEFI + NVMe install disk required (/dev/nvme0n1). After install, force Plasma before reboot — Gaming Mode needs Deck AMD GPU (passthrough optional).

Other.tip: Generic default from host architecture. Computer Type remains fully editable.

FreeDOS.tip: FreeDOS → i386 PC (IDE). Supports FAT32/LFN/CD-ROM better than MS-DOS. Prefer IBM PC 32Bit.

Mac OS 6.tip: System 6 / early Mac OS → qemu-system-m68k + Quadra 800 (q800). Experimental; supply your own disk/ROM image.

NeXTSTEP.tip: NeXTSTEP → qemu-system-m68k + next-cube. Supply NeXT install media; experimental.

OPENSTEP.tip: OPENSTEP / NeXTSTEP for Intel → i386 PC. Use period install media; drivers are picky.

GhostBSD.tip: GhostBSD → x86_64 + Q35 with VirtIO (FreeBSD-based desktop).

HP-UX.tip: HP-UX → qemu-system-hppa + B160L. Use SCSI disk (lsi53c895a). Needs a PA-RISC QEMU build and HP-UX install media.

Linux on IBM Z.tip: Linux on IBM Z → qemu-system-s390x + s390-ccw-virtio. VirtIO CCW disk/net; typically headless (no VGA).

CentOS Stream.tip: CentOS Stream → x86_64 + Q35 with VirtIO (RHEL upstream).

NixOS.tip: NixOS → x86_64 + Q35 + VirtIO. UEFI/OVMF recommended for modern installers.

Pop!_OS.tip: Pop!_OS → x86_64 + Q35. Prefer VirtIO VGA (GL) on Linux/KVM for COSMIC/GNOME.

Void Linux.tip: Void Linux → x86_64 + Q35 with VirtIO.

elementary OS.tip: elementary OS → x86_64 + Q35 with VirtIO.

9front.tip: 9front (Plan 9 fork) → x86_64 + pc, std VGA, IDE, e1000. Attach 9front ISO; networking is central.

Plan 9.tip: Plan 9 → x86_64 + pc, std VGA, IDE, e1000. Prefer 9front for an actively maintained fork.

Fuchsia.tip: Fuchsia → x86_64 + Q35/VirtIO. Official workflow often uses Google ffx + QEMU; AQEMU gives a starting preset.

MenuetOS.tip: MenuetOS 64-bit → qemu-system-x86_64. Boot from floppy image (FDA) or ISO; distinct from 32-bit KolibriOS.

Minix.tip: Minix 3 → i386 PC. IDE disk recommended for classic images.

QNX.tip: QNX Neutrino → x86_64 PC. Timer-sensitive: AQEMU adds -rtc clock=vm. Legacy QNX 4 may need i386.

Redox OS.tip: Redox OS (Rust microkernel) → x86_64 + Q35, std VGA. Use official Redox images.

OpenServer.tip: SCO OpenServer → i386 PC, IDE, cirrus VGA. Classic retail/banking Unix; period media required.

UnixWare.tip: SCO UnixWare → i386 PC, IDE, cirrus VGA.

Windows XP (32-bit).tip: Windows XP 32-bit (proven AQEMU profile): i386 + pc, Force TCG / pentium3, std VGA, ACPI off, IDE, rtl8139, AC97, 1 GB, 1 CPU. Avoid WHPX (black text-mode setup).

Windows XP (64-bit).tip: Windows XP x64 Edition → qemu-system-x86_64 + pc (i440FX).

Ubuntu (64-bit).tip: Ubuntu → x86_64 (PC) + Q35. VirtIO net suggested; change Computer Type if needed.

Ubuntu (32-bit).tip: Ubuntu 32-bit → i386 PC. Prefer for older ISOs.

Debian (32-bit).tip: Debian 32-bit → i386 PC. Prefer for older ISOs.

Fedora (32-bit).tip: Fedora 32-bit → i386 PC. Prefer for older ISOs.

Alpine Linux (64-bit).tip: Alpine Linux → x86_64 (PC) + Q35 with VirtIO.

Alpine Linux (32-bit).tip: Alpine Linux 32-bit → i386 PC. Prefer for older ISOs.

Tiny Core Linux (64-bit).tip: Tiny Core Linux → x86_64 (PC) + Q35 with VirtIO.

Tiny Core Linux (32-bit).tip: Tiny Core Linux 32-bit → i386 PC. Prefer for older ISOs.

Generic Linux (64-bit).tip: Generic Linux → x86_64 (PC) + Q35 with VirtIO. Change Computer Type for other arches.

Generic Linux (32-bit).tip: Generic Linux 32-bit → i386 PC. Prefer for older ISOs.

Arch Linux (64-bit).tip: Arch Linux → x86_64 (PC) + Q35 with VirtIO.

Arch Linux (32-bit).tip: Arch Linux 32-bit → i386 PC. Prefer for older ISOs.

openSUSE (32-bit).tip: openSUSE 32-bit → i386 PC. Prefer for older ISOs.

Linux Mint (64-bit).tip: Linux Mint → x86_64 (PC) + Q35 with VirtIO.

Linux Mint (32-bit).tip: Linux Mint 32-bit → i386 PC. Prefer for older ISOs.

ReactOS (32-bit).tip: ReactOS 32-bit (proven AQEMU profile): i386 + pc, Force TCG / pentium3, std VGA, IDE (classic -hda), e1000, AC97, usb-tablet, native display, 1 GB, 1 CPU.

ReactOS (64-bit).tip: ReactOS 64-bit (experimental builds) → x86_64 PC. Prefer 32-bit for stable ISOs.

BBC micro:bit.tip: BBC micro:bit → qemu-system-arm -M microbit. Load .hex/.elf firmware; not a desktop OS.

Arduino Uno.tip: Arduino Uno → qemu-system-avr -M arduino-uno. ATmega328P Arduino Uno; load firmware ELF.

Arduino Mega.tip: Arduino Mega → qemu-system-avr -M arduino-mega. ATmega2560 Arduino; load firmware ELF.

Arduino Duemilanove.tip: Arduino Duemilanove → qemu-system-avr -M arduino-duemilanove. ATmega168 Arduino; load firmware ELF.

ARM Versatile PB.tip: ARM Versatile PB → qemu-system-arm -M versatilepb. Classic ARM Versatile Platform Baseboard.

ARM Integrator/CP.tip: ARM Integrator/CP → qemu-system-arm -M integratorcp. ARM Integrator/CP development board.

Cubieboard.tip: Cubieboard → qemu-system-arm -M cubieboard. Allwinner A10 board.

Orange Pi PC.tip: Orange Pi PC → qemu-system-arm -M orangepi-pc. Allwinner H3 board.

Raspberry Pi Zero.tip: Raspberry Pi Zero → qemu-system-arm -M raspi0. SD image required; machine support varies by QEMU build.

Raspberry Pi 1.tip: Raspberry Pi 1 → qemu-system-arm -M raspi1ap. SD image required.

Raspberry Pi 2.tip: Raspberry Pi 2 → qemu-system-arm -M raspi2b. SD image required.

Raspberry Pi 3.tip: Raspberry Pi 3 → qemu-system-aarch64 -M raspi3b. SD image; experimental in many builds.

Raspberry Pi 4.tip: Raspberry Pi 4 → qemu-system-aarch64 -M raspi4b. SD image; experimental in many builds.

Macintosh Quadra 800.tip: Macintosh Quadra 800 → qemu-system-m68k -M q800. Macintosh Quadra 800 (m68k).

NeXT Cube.tip: NeXT Cube → qemu-system-m68k -M next-cube. NeXT Cube hardware for NeXTSTEP.

AmigaOne.tip: AmigaOne → qemu-system-ppc -M amigaone. AmigaOne PowerPC board.

Pegasos II.tip: Pegasos II → qemu-system-ppc -M pegasos2. Genesi/bPlan Pegasos II.

440 Bamboo.tip: 440 Bamboo → qemu-system-ppc -M bamboo. PowerPC 440 Bamboo board.

ARM Versatile AB.tip: ARM Versatile AB → qemu-system-arm -M versatileab. ARM Versatile Application Baseboard.

ARM Virt (generic).tip: ARM Virt (generic) → qemu-system-aarch64 -M virt. Generic ARM virt machine — best for Linux/Android-on-ARM VMs.

B-L475E-IOT01A.tip: B-L475E-IOT01A → qemu-system-arm -M b-l475e-iot01a. STM32L4 Discovery IoT node.

Freescale Sabre Lite.tip: Freescale Sabre Lite → qemu-system-arm -M sabrelite. i.MX6 Sabre Lite.

i.MX25 PDK.tip: i.MX25 PDK → qemu-system-arm -M imx25-pdk. Freescale i.MX25 Product Development Kit.

i.MX6UL EVK.tip: i.MX6UL EVK → qemu-system-arm -M mcimx6ul-evk. NXP i.MX6UL evaluation kit.

i.MX7D Sabre.tip: i.MX7D Sabre → qemu-system-arm -M mcimx7d-sabre. NXP i.MX7D Sabre board.

IBM Power Series 6050/6070.tip: IBM Power Series 6050/6070 → qemu-system-ppc -M 40p. IBM RS/6000 40p (PREP).

Kyoto Microcomputer KZM-ARM11.tip: Kyoto Microcomputer KZM-ARM11 → qemu-system-arm -M kzm. KZM-ARM11-01 board.

Loongson-3 Virt.tip: Loongson-3 Virt → qemu-system-mips64el -M loongson3-virt. Loongson-3 virtual platform.

MIPS Boston.tip: MIPS Boston → qemu-system-mips64el -M boston. MIPS Boston board.

MIPS Magnum.tip: MIPS Magnum → qemu-system-mips64 -M magnum. MIPS Magnum R4000.

MIPS Malta.tip: MIPS Malta → qemu-system-mips64el -M malta. MIPS Malta development board.

MIPS Pica 61.tip: MIPS Pica 61 → qemu-system-mips64 -M pica61. MIPS Jazz Pica 61.

MPS2 AN385.tip: MPS2 AN385 → qemu-system-arm -M mps2-an385. ARM MPS2 FPGA (AN385).

MPS2 AN505.tip: MPS2 AN505 → qemu-system-arm -M mps2-an505. ARM MPS2 FPGA (AN505).

MPS2 AN521.tip: MPS2 AN521 → qemu-system-arm -M mps2-an521. ARM MPS2 FPGA (AN521).

MPS3 AN524.tip: MPS3 AN524 → qemu-system-arm -M mps3-an524. ARM MPS3 FPGA (AN524).

MPS3 AN547.tip: MPS3 AN547 → qemu-system-arm -M mps3-an547. ARM MPS3 FPGA (AN547).

Netduino Plus 2.tip: Netduino Plus 2 → qemu-system-arm -M netduinoplus2. Netduino Plus 2.

Olimex STM32-H405.tip: Olimex STM32-H405 → qemu-system-arm -M olimex-stm32-h405. Olimex STM32-H405 board.

OpenTitan.tip: OpenTitan → qemu-system-riscv32 -M opentitan. OpenTitan Earl Grey.

Pegasos I.tip: Pegasos I → qemu-system-ppc -M pegasos1. Genesi/bPlan Pegasos I.

Petalogix ML605.tip: Petalogix ML605 → qemu-system-microblaze -M petalogix-ml605. Petalogix ML605.

PowerMac G3 Beige.tip: PowerMac G3 Beige → qemu-system-ppc -M g3beige. OldWorld Power Macintosh G3 (Beige).

PowerMac Mac99.tip: PowerMac Mac99 → qemu-system-ppc -M mac99. PowerMac G4-ish mac99 machine.

PowerPC e500.tip: PowerPC e500 → qemu-system-ppc -M ppce500. Freescale e500 platform.

Raspberry Pi 3A+.tip: Raspberry Pi 3A+ → qemu-system-aarch64 -M raspi3ap. SD image; experimental in many builds.

RealView EB.tip: RealView EB → qemu-system-arm -M realview-eb. ARM RealView Emulation Baseboard.

RealView EB MPCore.tip: RealView EB MPCore → qemu-system-arm -M realview-eb-mpcore. RealView EB with MPCore.

RealView PB-A8.tip: RealView PB-A8 → qemu-system-arm -M realview-pb-a8. RealView Platform Baseboard for Cortex-A8.

RealView PBX-A9.tip: RealView PBX-A9 → qemu-system-arm -M realview-pbx-a9. RealView PBX for Cortex-A9.

Renesas R2D.tip: Renesas R2D → qemu-system-sh4 -M r2d. Renesas SH4 R2D-PLUS.

RISC-V Spike.tip: RISC-V Spike → qemu-system-riscv64 -M spike. RISC-V Spike ISA simulator machine.

Sam460ex.tip: Sam460ex → qemu-system-ppc -M sam460ex. ACube Sam460ex Amiga-compatible.

SBSA Reference.tip: SBSA Reference → qemu-system-aarch64 -M sbsa-ref. ARM SBSA Reference Platform.

Sharp Zaurus SL-5500.tip: Sharp Zaurus SL-5500 → qemu-system-arm -M collie. Sharp Zaurus Collie PDA.

Siemens SX1.tip: Siemens SX1 → qemu-system-arm -M sx1. Siemens SX1 smartphone.

Siemens SX1 v1.tip: Siemens SX1 v1 → qemu-system-arm -M sx1-v1. Siemens SX1 (v1).

SiFive E31.tip: SiFive E31 → qemu-system-riscv32 -M sifive_e. SiFive E31 / HiFive1-class.

SiFive HiFive Unleashed.tip: SiFive HiFive Unleashed → qemu-system-riscv64 -M sifive_u. SiFive U54 / HiFive Unleashed.

Stellaris LM3S6965.tip: Stellaris LM3S6965 → qemu-system-arm -M lm3s6965evb. TI Stellaris LM3S6965EVB.

Stellaris LM3S811.tip: Stellaris LM3S811 → qemu-system-arm -M lm3s811evb. TI Stellaris LM3S811EVB.

STM32VLDISCOVERY.tip: STM32VLDISCOVERY → qemu-system-arm -M stm32vldiscovery. ST STM32VLDISCOVERY board.

Versatile Express A15.tip: Versatile Express A15 → qemu-system-arm -M vexpress-a15. ARM Versatile Express with Cortex-A15.

Versatile Express A9.tip: Versatile Express A9 → qemu-system-arm -M vexpress-a9. ARM Versatile Express with Cortex-A9.

Xilinx Virtex ML507.tip: Xilinx Virtex ML507 → qemu-system-ppc -M virtex-ml507. Xilinx Virtex ML507.

Xilinx ZCU102.tip: Xilinx ZCU102 → qemu-system-aarch64 -M xlnx-zcu102. ZynqMP ZCU102 evaluation kit.

Xilinx Zynq A9.tip: Xilinx Zynq A9 → qemu-system-arm -M xilinx-zynq-a9. Xilinx Zynq Platform Baseboard for Cortex-A9.
